rule.description: Zeek: file $(file_name) possible malware, source ip $(src_ip), destination ip $(dest_ip), destination port $(dest_port), mime type $(mime_type), total bytes $(total_bytes), sha1 $(sha1), sha256 $(sha256), note $(note).
Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (live). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(src_ip), destination ip: $(dest_ip), destination port: $(dest_port), payload type: $(weird_name).

Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (closed). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(src_ip), destination ip: $(dest_ip), destination port: $(dest_port), payload type: $(weird_name), duration: $(duration), origin bytes: $(orig_bytes), response bytes: $(resp_bytes).

Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (traffic). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(src_ip), destination ip: $(dest_ip), destination port: $(dest_port), payload type: $(weird_name), duration: $(duration), origin bytes: $(orig_bytes), response bytes: $(resp_bytes), origin packets: $(orig_pkts), responsepackets: $(resp_pkts).
Zeek: Baseline completed and dynamic threshold calculated. src_ip: $(src_ip)
Zeek: Total outgoing bytes exceeding the dynamic threshold. Possible Data Exfiltration. src_ip: $(src_ip), dest_ip: $(dest_ip):$(dest_port)
